xsl:stylesheet.xsl:variable: |Nawashi Riko|Barbara Fuchs|Pentagon U.S. Military|Wells K.C.|The Other Journal|Richard Foley|Isshika Haruka|Dian Hanson|Franklin Juhl|Ben Sinninger|Victoria Rush|Ca$h|Leon Degrelle|Jean-Marie Le Pen|Jurgen Graf|Leon Degrelle|Carlo Mattongo|Douglas Reed|Henry Ford|Robert Brasillach|Zdzisław Ciesiołkiewicz|Feliksa Eger|Adam Gmurczyk|Tomasz Greniuch|Derek Holland|David Irving|Teodor Jeske-Choiński|Hennecke Kardel|Józef Kruszyński|Andrew Macdonald|Eligiusz Niewiadomski|Jerzy Robert Nowak|Michał Poradowski|August Rohling|Felix Steiner|Bolesław Tejkowski|Hugon Wast|Emily White|

xsl:for-each.select: /offer/products/product[ price/@gross > 0 and description/name/. != '' and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '1909') and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '2806') and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '2081') and not(iaiext:priority_menu/site/menu[1]/item/@id = '1614')]

xsl:if.test: not(contains($zbanowani_autorzy, $autor_wer)) and not ( @id = '2091856' or @id = '1394822' or @id= '2363175' or @id = '442704' or @id= '504250' or @id= '899184' or @id= '1475524' or @id= '2106734' or @id = '323919' or @id= '409851' or @id= '1044393' or @id= '311511' or @id= '2576201' or @id = '726369' or @id= '1038139' or @id= '1044409' or @id= '1428808' or @id= '2583335' or @id = '508823' or @id= '546037' or @id= '2587647' or @id= '2587648' or @id= '2584642' or @id = '2587649' or @id= '2587650' or @id= '1774865' or @id= '1780077' or @id= '2589464' or @id = '2017599' or @id= '2093820' or @id= '2099819' or @id= '2420026' or @id= '2594710' or @id = '2589447' or @id= '2594709' or @id= '2595049' or @id= '492340' or @id= '290134' or @id = '510190' or @id= '563663' or @id= '1365852' or @id= '1776049' or @id= '396358' or @id = '436799' or @id= '1855996' or @id= '2011464' or @id= '2043426' or @id= '2420030' or @id = '350270' or @id= '363900' ) and not( contains($tekst,'alprazolam') or contains($tekst,'xanax') or contains($tekst,'misoprostol') or contains($tekst,'przeciwwirus') or contains($tekst,'antystresowy') or contains($tekst,'rewolwer') or contains($tekst,'nóż') or contains($tekst,'nożyk') or contains($tekst,'multitool') or contains($tekst,'desert eagle') or contains($tekst,'cielesne rozkosze') or contains($tekst,'romans erotyczny') or contains($tekst,'incest') or contains($tekst,'miecz ') or contains($tekst,'sword') or contains($tekst,'hentai') or contains($tekst,'naked') or contains($tekst,'nudity') or contains($tekst,'nagość') or contains($tekst,'leczenie') or contains($tekst,'leczyć') or contains($tekst,'dieta') or contains($tekst,'noże') or contains($tekst,'chlorek magnezu') or contains($tekst,'(pdf)') or contains($tekst,'encyklopedia zdrowia') or contains($tekst,'kontaktologia ') or contains($tekst,'przeciwzapalny') or contains($tekst,'leczymy') or contains($tekst,'kuracje') or contains($tekst,'zdrowe oczy') or contains($tekst,'mein kampf') or contains($tekst,'cock') or contains($tekst,'boobs') or contains($tekst,'erotic') or contains($tekst,'sperm') or contains($tekst,'tarot') or contains($tekst,'penis') or contains($tekst,'piersi') or contains($tekst,'sex') or contains($tekst,'wagina') or contains($tekst,'vagina') or contains($tekst,'sessuale') or contains($tekst,'seks') or contains($tekst,'cipa') or contains($tekst,'cipek') or contains($tekst,'marihuana') or contains($tekst,'marijuana') or contains($tekst,'łuk') or contains($tekst,'pistolet') or contains($tekst,'broń') or contains($tekst,'ebook') or contains($tekst,'audiobook') or contains($tekst,'karabin') or contains($tekst,'glock') or contains($tekst,'shotgun') or contains($tekst,'strzelba') or contains($tekst,'gun') or contains($tekst,'zestaw wojskowy') or contains($tekst,'wyrzutnia') or contains($tekst,'książki religijne') or contains($tekst,'kamasutra') or contains($tekst,'erotyka') or contains($tekst,'koks'))

xsl:when.test: string-length($kod_producer) = '14' or string-length($kod_producer) = '13' or string-length($kod_producer) = '12' or string-length($kod_producer) = '8'
string-length($code_on_card) = '14' or string-length($code_on_card) = '13' or string-length($code_on_card) = '12' or string-length($code_on_card) = '8'

$cat_id = '5698' or $cat_id = '5509' or $cat_id = '5699' or $cat_id = '5701' or $cat_id = '5702' or $cat_id = '5703' or $cat_id = '5704' or $cat_id = '5708' or $cat_id = '5709' or $cat_id = '5710' or $cat_id = '5711' or $cat_id = '5713' or $cat_id = '5714' or $cat_id = '5715' or $cat_id = '5716' or $cat_id = '5717' or $cat_id = '5718' or $cat_id = '5719' or $cat_id = '5720' or $cat_id = '5721' or $cat_id = '5855'

$cat_id = '5481' or $cat_id = '5506' or $cat_id = '5508' or $cat_id = '5510' or $cat_id = '5512' or $cat_id = '5513' or $cat_id = '5514' or $cat_id = '5515' or $cat_id = '5516' or $cat_id = '5518' or $cat_id = '5519' or $cat_id = '5520' or $cat_id = '5522' or $cat_id = '5523' or $cat_id = '5524' or $cat_id = '5527' or $cat_id = '5552'
